name: Synup vs SingleInterface
hero_main_title: The Best SingleInterface Alternative – Personalize your local marketing
hero_summary: Why empty your pockets for a generic local marketing solution? Take end-to-end control of your local presence and connect with your customers with content that matters to them. Find a SingleInterface alternative that enhances how your customers interact with you at every point in their journey – right from when they do a “near me” search to their post-purchase experience and feedback.
counter_text_1: say they effortlessly increased store visits
counter_text_2: 20% of businesses increased their online conversions year-over-year
counter_text_3: businesses seamlessly listed across key online platforms
section_2_heading: Synup's Powerful Automations and Intuitive Dashboard Compared to SingleInterface
section_2_summary: While SingleInterface is more eCommerce-specific, Synup caters to the needs of different types of multi-location brands – from boutique stores to large healthcare chains. We understand the “multi-location” tag isn’t enough to define your specific industry. Our in-house team of experts ensures all your listings are set up to best serve your specific industry. Here’s what’s on offer:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Unlike SingleInterface, Synup offers automated listing updates and syncs across 60+ discovery sites. You can also make quick, easy changes to your local listings from our dashboard without the added cost of managing these services. Synup also helps you build highly customized local store pages that drive relevant traffic to your business.
section_2_slider_2_summary: While SingleInterface is great for surface-level presence management, Synup goes a step beyond. With in-depth listing performance analytics and local rank-tracking tools, you can get comprehensive insights into your local performance and continue to do better.
section_2_step_3_summary: While SingleInterface is a good option to monitor and manage reviews, Synup helps you take full control of your reputation. From sentiment analysis to actually acquiring more positive reviews that help your online presence. And the best part? You get easy automation with your CRM and POS systems to collect reviews whenever you get a new customer.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Want listing management at scale? Synup helps you manage multiple locations and client accounts in one place. You can offer our solutions under your own brand and provide a cohesive experience to your clients.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE-BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Local over SingleInterface?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: Synup offers superior integration capabilities, ensuring a seamless connection with various platforms, including your CRM and POS systems.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Unlike SingleInterface, Synup gives you more hours back into the week with easy automation for managing your reviews, running local campaigns, as well as listings seamlessly
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Synup's platform connects seamlessly across different aspects of your local marketing needs, providing you with a solution you can implement with a blindfold
why_choose_content_title: Synup: The Pinnacle of Digital Mastery
why_choose_content_summary: Transform Your Business with Synup – Beyond Comparison, Beyond Expectation.

Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
